ddls:
CREATE TABLE "resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of the resource (e.g., Reports, Malware IP, User Agent) */,
  "natural_id" TEXT /* Natural ID assigned to the resource */,
  "display_name" TEXT /* Display name of the resource for user reference */,
  "parent_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent resource if applicable */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the threat category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the resource was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the resource was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "malware_ips" (
  "ip_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each malware IP entry */,
  "natural_id" TEXT /* Natural ID assigned to the malware IP */,
  "display_name" TEXT /* Display name for the malware IP entry */,
  "is_emerging" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the IP address is associated with emerging threats */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource it belongs to */,
  "threat_level" TEXT /* Threat level associated with the malware IP (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "first_seen" TEXT /* Timestamp when the malware IP was first seen */,
  "last_seen" TEXT /* Timestamp when the malware IP was last seen */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_malware_ips_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_agents" (
  "ua_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user agent entry */,
  "natural_id" TEXT /* Natural ID assigned to the user agent */,
  "display_name" TEXT /* Display name for the user agent */,
  "is_blacklisted" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user agent is blacklisted */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the user agent */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user agent was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user agent was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ua_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_reports" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident report */,
  "incident_type" TEXT /* Type of the incident (e.g., malware attack, phishing) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the incident */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated resource */,
  "reported_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reported the incident */,
  "reported_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the incident was reported */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the incident (e.g., open, in_progress, closed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_reports_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resources_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage record */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the resource was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, download) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the resource */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of access in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resources_usage_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resources_usage_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the accessed resource */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., viewed, edited) */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the action (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "threat_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each threat category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the threat category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the threat category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the threat category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the threat category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alert_settings" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert setting */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the alert */,
  "threshold" INTEGER /* Threshold value for the alert */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource the alert is tied to */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., usage threshold exceeded) */,
  "notification_method" TEXT /* Method of notification (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  "enabled" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the alert is enabled */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_settings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated resource */,
  "key" TEXT /* Key for the metadata entry */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value associated with the key */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metadata was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metadata was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_metadata_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version entry */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated resource */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the version */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_versions_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the group */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the group was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the group was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_group_memberships" (
  "membership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each membership entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the group */,
  "joined_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user joined the group */,
  "left_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user left the group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("membership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_group_memberships_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES user_groups ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_group_memberships_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission entry */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated resource */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the group */,
  "permission_level" TEXT /* Level of permission (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_permissions_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_permissions_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES user_groups ("group_id")
)
